active_checklist: Monitor the active Kanboard completion wave through AO status, heartbeat, runsheet, and tmux panes; do not perform implementation in the supermanager lane.
lane_claim: Supermanager monitor for the live Kanboard completion wave. Governance promotion is intentionally held until implementation/data manager lanes report.
notes: User directive: use autonomous-orchestrator only for delegation; do not use built-in Codex agent methods. Governance lane is intentionally pending until active manager lanes report.

items.title: Define active manager topology with workers as optional parallel sidecars only
Spawn independent implementation/data manager lanes in tmux
Monitor manager progress, runsheets, logs, and blockers
Spawn governance/promotion manager only after active lanes report
